name: lingcang
description: LingCang is a multi-account workspace browser for isolated creator sessions.

scripts.package:mac: pnpm run build:ts && pnpm run build:css && pnpm run prepare:package && node scripts/package-platform.mjs mac && node -e "require('fs').rmSync('.package',{recursive:true,force:true})"
scripts.package:win: pnpm run build:ts && pnpm run build:css && pnpm run prepare:package && node scripts/package-platform.mjs win && node -e "require('fs').rmSync('.package',{recursive:true,force:true})"
scripts.package:linux: pnpm run build:ts && pnpm run build:css && pnpm run prepare:package && node scripts/package-platform.mjs linux && node -e "require('fs').rmSync('.package',{recursive:true,force:true})"
scripts.landing:build: mkdir -p public && cp assets/app-logo.svg public/app-logo.svg && cp landing/index.html public/index.html
scripts.start: pnpm run build:ts && pnpm run build:css && electron .
